![](https://oxico.sk/lg/aj/assets/ukazky/images/e434c05667eb28362201d5abe3dbfb90bd03bb9f8e84af08a8a73cf2d6d6c58a.jpg)

# CAMBRIDGE

# Language summary

# Key vocabulary

Key grammar and functions

Phonics

# Hello!

page 4

Greetings: Hello, I'm (Stella),

Goodbye.

What's your name?

How old are you? I'm (seven).

What colour's (the pencil)? It's (red).

# My school

page 10

School objects: book, chair, eraser, pen, pencil, table

Character names: Alex, Lenny

# Marie's maths Adding

page 16

# Favourite toys

page 18

Toys: ball, bike, car, computer, doll, train

Colours: black, brown, grey, white

# My family

page 24

Family: brother, sister, father, mother, grandfather, grandmother

# Review

# H

# Our pets

page 34

Pets: bird, cat, dog, fish, horse, mouse

# My face

page 40

The face: ears, eyes, face, hair, mouth, nose, tooth/teeth

Body parts: head, knees, shoulders, toes

# CAMBRIDGE

# Key vocabulary

# Phonics

# Wild animals

page 48

Animals: crocodile, elephant, giraffe, hippo, monkey, snake, tiger

Body parts: arm, foot/feet, hand, leg, tail

# My clothes

page 54

Clothes: jacket, shoes, skirt, socks, (pair of) trousers, T-shirt

# Review

# page 62

# Fun time!

page 64

# At the funfair

page 70

# Marie's sports Things for sports

page 76

# Our house

page 78

Rooms: bathroom, bedroom, dining room, hall, kitchen, living room

# Party time!

page 84

Food: apple, banana, burger, cake, chocolate, ice cream, kiwi

Activities: make a cake

I like (cake). I don't like (chocolate). Do you like (snakes)? Yes, I do. No, I don't.

Marie's art Fruit in painting

page 90

# CAMBRIDGE

# Hello!

1 Listen and point.

Stella

Simon

Mrs Star

Listen and repeat.

# CAMBRIDGE

Cambridge University Press

978-1-316-62766-2 — Kid's Box Level 1 Pupil's Book Exam Update British English

Caroline Nixon , Michael Tomlinson
